recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Elena Undone
recommendations.overview: The wife of a pastor who preaches against homosexuality embarks on an affair with a female writer.

recommendations.title: Russian Lolita
recommendations.overview: Very loosely based on Nabokov’s ‘Lolita’, this is the story of a writer renting a room at a single mother’s house that starts an affair with the daughter of her.

recommendations.title: Obsession
recommendations.overview: Gino, a drifter, begins an affair with inn-owner Giovanna as they plan to get rid of her older husband.

recommendations.title: The Kid
recommendations.overview: New Mexico Territory, 1880. Rio Cutler and his older sister Sara must abandon their home after an unfortunate event happens. In their desperate flee to Santa Fe, they cross paths with the infamous outlaw Billy the Kid and his gang, who are ruthlessly

recommendations.title: About Last Night...
recommendations.overview: A man and woman meet and try to have a romantic affair, despite their personal problems and the interference of their disapproving friends.

recommendations.title: A Countess from Hong Kong
recommendations.overview: A Russian countess stows away in the stateroom of a married U.S. diplomat bound for New York.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: Men in Hope
recommendations.overview: Charming bon vivant Rudolf is convinced that infidelity is the basis for a happy marriage, since, after all, a woman does not want to be bored with her partner.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle
recommendations.overview: An employee at the French Embassy in Bangkok invites his wife to join him – and enjoy the benefits of their open marriage.
